title: ulex × dalilae
intro: Ulex × dalilae, also known as gorse hybrid, is a hybrid of the Ulex europaeus and Ulex gallii species, often found in coastal areas and heathlands. The medicinal properties of Ulex × dalilae include its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, which are attributed to the presence of saponins, flavonoids, and phenolic acids. The health benefits of this plant are said to include the reduction of oxidative stress, improvement of cardiovascular health, and potential anti-cancer properties. Ulex × dalilae can be prepared as an herbal tea or infested oil to harness its medicinal properties.
